note: Recorded ratio = median(native) / median(baseline). Absolute gate uses limits[workload].max_ratio (else MAKO_NATIVE_MAX_RATIO / 1.25). Regression fails if current ratio > recorded * MAKO_NATIVE_REGRESSION (default 1.15). Update after intentional speed work on a primary host.
host_hint: Apple arm64, 2026-07-23, LLVM release; map identity hash + 50% pre-size; I/O open+fstat+read/write, 500×4KiB
